text.title: Ads Budget Optimization Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: fix attribution first via ads-attribution-models; allocate on broken data is worse
carve out 10% test reserve before next cycle

branch.when: spend_monthly >= 1000 AND attribution_variance <= 0.15 AND test_reserve_pct > 0 AND step_change_pct > 0.20

conclusion.verdict: cap weekly step at 20%; ramp over 3-4 weeks for larger targets

branch.when: spend_monthly >= 1000 AND attribution_variance <= 0.15 AND test_reserve_pct > 0 AND step_change_pct <= 0.20

conclusion.verdict: ship monthly allocation spec + weekly review template

example.trace: spend_monthly >= 1000 AND attribution_variance <= 0.15 AND test_reserve_pct > 0 AND step_change_pct <= 0.20 → conclusion ref="efficiency-ratio-based" verdict="ship monthly allocation spec + weekly review template"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
